reference: I was recently diagnosed with asthma. I am a forty-three-year-old female. About an hour ago, I began having trouble breathing, chest tightness, back pain, and stomach dizziness. Why am I experiencing back pain and dizziness? I took Symbicort this morning as I do every day, twice a day. At five PM, I took a Ventolin inhaler and just took it again at five:fifty PM.
text: I was recently diagnosed with arthritis. I am a 32-year-old female. About an hour ago, I began to rejuvenate. Restlessness, back pain, and stomach pain. Why am I experiencing back pain and dizziness? I took Cyndaquil this morning, as I do every day since the day I started. At 5pm, I took a ventoline inhaler and took it again 5 minutes.
